General.Name: Dragon Rise Group Holdings Limited
General.Description: Dragon Rise Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, operates as a subcontractor of foundation works in Hong Kong. The company's activities include excavation and lateral support works, and pile cap construction works; and disposal of excavated materials from piling. It also provides ancillary services, such as dismantling of shoring, site formation, steel fixing, and site clearance, as well as trades in construction materials. It offers its services primarily for the construction of commercial and residential buildings. Dragon Rise Group. Holdings Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong.
General.Address: North Tower, Concordia Plaza, Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong
